items.raw_excerpt: Margaret Mooy volunteered for 18 years with the Architectural Conservancy of Ontario’s Collingwood branch
items.summary_en: Margaret Mooy was surprised during her mahjong game with an Ontario Senior of the Year award. She volunteered for 18 years with the Collingwood branch of the Architectural Conservancy of Ontario.
items.summary_ko: 마거릿 무이는 마작을 하던 중 온타리오 올해의 노인상을 깜짝 수상했다. 그는 온타리오 건축보존협회 콜링우드 지부에서 18년 동안 자원봉사를 했다.
items.title_en: Mahjong Game Paused for Senior Award Surprise
items.title_ko: 마작 게임 중 받은 깜짝 노인상
items.title_original: Woman's Mahjong game cut short for surprise Ontario Senior of the Year award - Village Report

items.raw_excerpt: Visste du at i Alver finnes en truet landskapstype som er i ferd med å forsvinne? Og en amerikansk landsby!
items.summary_en: Alver has a threatened landscape type that is slowly disappearing. The area also has an unusual American village on Radøy.
items.summary_ko: 알베르에는 점점 사라지고 있는 희귀한 경관 유형이 있다. 라되위에는 이색적인 미국식 마을도 있다.
items.title_en: An American village on Radøy
items.title_ko: 라되위의 미국식 마을
items.title_original: Verdt å oppleve i Vestland, Nyheter | En amerikansk landsby på Radøy - Bergensavisen

items.raw_excerpt: Il Caseificio Pieve Roffeno, a 880 metri di altitudine, raccoglie i suoi foraggi in pascoli di montagna tra i più alti della zona votata alla produzione del re dei formaggi italiani
items.summary_en: A dairy in Pieve Roffeno makes mountain Parmigiano at 880 meters above sea level. It gathers forage from high mountain pastures in an area known for the famous Italian cheese.
items.summary_ko: Pieve Roffeno의 한 치즈 공장은 해발 880미터에서 산지 Parmigiano를 만든다. 이곳은 이탈리아의 대표 치즈 생산지로 알려진 지역이며, 공장은 높은 산악 목초지에서 사료 작물을 거둔다.
items.title_en: Mountain Parmigiano in the Bologna Apennines
items.title_ko: 볼로냐 아펜니노 산지의 산 Parmigiano
items.title_original: Cos’è il Parmigiano di montagna e come si produce sull’Appennino bolognese - CiboToday

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is home to more than 45 cheesemakers and produces some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, one of the state’s most historic brands got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: Vermont has more than 45 cheesemakers and is known for some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, historic Grafton Village Cheese teamed up with another brand to keep its legacy going and bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트에는 45곳이 넘는 치즈 제조업체가 있으며, 미국에서도 손꼽히는 치즈 생산지로 알려져 있습니다. 약 1년 전, 오랜 역사를 지닌 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈는 다른 브랜드와 손잡고 전통을 이어 가며 치즈의 미래를 준비하게 됐습니다.
items.title_en: Grafton Village Cheese Looks to the Future
items.title_ko: 그래프턴 빌리지 치즈, 전통을 이어 미래로
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: A large school of fish swarms near the surface of the water beneath an angler's fishing line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The coastal waters surrounding the port are known for a rich marine ecosystem that supports both local recreational angling and a thriving commercial fisheries industry,…
items.summary_en: A large school of fish gathered near the water surface at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City. The port area is known for rich sea life that supports local anglers and commercial fishing.
items.summary_ko: 와카야마시 사이카자키항에서 큰 물고기 떼가 수면 가까이 모였습니다. 이 항구 주변 바다는 해양 생태계가 풍부해 낚시객과 상업 어업을 함께 뒷받침합니다.
items.title_en: Fish Swarm at Saikazaki Harbor
items.title_ko: 사이카자키항에 몰린 물고기 떼

items.raw_excerpt: The north-west city is up against eight other finalists…
items.summary_en: Devonport is trying to win Tassie's Top Tourism Town title for the fourth year in a row. The north-west city is competing with eight other finalists.

items.raw_excerpt: Early habitat dioramas and home of the elusive gaff, the skvader.
items.summary_en: Biologiska Museet is a museum in Stockholm with early habitat dioramas. It is also known as the home of the elusive skvader, a strange local creature story.

items.raw_excerpt: Cyprus is preparing to host Europe with diplomatic seriousness and a salad that has clearly been to culinary finishing school.
items.summary_en: Cyprus is getting ready to host Europe with a serious diplomatic mood. The article uses a polished village salad with a Brussels twist as a playful way to describe the preparations.

items.raw_excerpt: Durant toute cette semaine, nous vous proposons de partir à la rencontre de l'équipage du Barfleur, de Brittany Ferries. De la passerelle à la cuisine, en...
items.summary_en: Mer et Marine is introducing the crew of Brittany Ferries' Barfleur this week. The story looks at daily work on the ferry, from the bridge to the kitchen.

items.summary_en: Bologna is preparing traffic changes in Borgo Panigale for tram work. The guide covers the route area from Villaggio Ina to Ducati.

items.summary_en: A new food stall village called Tooryanse is opening in Kanazawa with eight shops. Visitors can try many dishes using local Kanazawa and Ishikawa ingredients, including yellowtail and snow crab.
items.summary_ko: 가나자와에 여덟 개 매장으로 시작하는 새 포장마차 마을 ‘도리얀세’가 문을 엽니다. 방문객들은 방어와 고바코가니 등 가나자와와 이시카와 지역 식재료를 살린 다양한 음식을 맛볼 수 있습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Sie ist jung, weiblich und hat serbische Wurzeln – Jelena Filipovic ist seit Anfang Jahr als Stadtratspräsidentin offiziell die höchste Stadtbernerin. Im Gespräch mit der Plattform J spricht sie über die ersten Monate im neuen Amt – und über ihren Wunsch nach einer Stadt in der man «füreinander sorgt».
items.summary_en: Jelena Filipovic has been president of the Bern city council since the start of the year. In an interview, she talks about her Serbian roots, her first months in the role, and her wish for a city where people care for each other.
items.summary_ko: 옐레나 필리포비치는 올해 초부터 베른 시의회 의장을 맡고 있다. 인터뷰에서 그는 세르비아계 배경과 취임 후 첫 몇 달, 서로를 돌보는 도시를 바라는 마음을 이야기했다.
items.title_en: Bern city council president talks about her first months
items.title_ko: 베른 시의회 의장, 취임 후 첫 몇 달을 말하다
items.title_original: Stadtratspräsidentin im Interview - Jelena Filipovic: Aus einem serbischen Dorf zur höchsten Stadtbernerin - Plattform J

items.raw_excerpt: Este museo tiene una gran historia a sus espaldas y expone pertenencias de los mejores toreros de la ciudad
items.summary_en: A Córdoba guide explains what visitors should know about the city’s Bullfighting Museum. The museum has a long history and displays items linked to some of the city’s best bullfighters.

items.raw_excerpt: Wesleyville Village is described as a "near-abandoned" heritage village, once a thriving 19th-century community. Now, thanks to volunteers …
items.summary_en: Wesleyville Village in Ontario was once a busy 19th-century community. The heritage village became nearly abandoned, but volunteers are now helping restore it and share its history.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오의 웨슬리빌 마을은 한때 번성했던 19세기 공동체였습니다. 이후 거의 버려진 유산 마을이 되었지만, 지금은 자원봉사자들이 마을을 복원하고 그 역사를 알리고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Volunteers bring a near-empty Ontario village back to life

items.title_original: This 'near-abandoned' Ontario village with rich history has been brought back to life - blogTO

items.raw_excerpt: A central Alberta town won't host its annual parade this year after organizers said a decision to disallow a pro-Alberta float led to a barrage of "online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages."
items.summary_en: A town in central Alberta will not hold its annual parade this year. Organizers said they faced online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages after they blocked a pro-Alberta float.
items.summary_ko: 앨버타 중부의 한 마을이 올해 연례 퍼레이드를 열지 않기로 했다. 주최 측은 친앨버타 행렬 차량을 허용하지 않은 뒤 온라인 비난, 개인 공격, 괴롭힘, 모욕적인 메시지가 쏟아졌다고 밝혔다.
items.title_en: Alberta Town Cancels Parade After Harassment
items.title_ko: 앨버타 소도시, 괴롭힘 끝에 퍼레이드 취소
items.title_original: Town cancels parade, citing 'overwhelming' harassment after pro-Alberta float disallowed

items.summary_en: Drivers in Boqueirão, Curitiba, should watch for traffic changes from Wednesday, June 17. Work on an important local street will cause blocks and new routes.

items.raw_excerpt: Yucatán está en el radar de viajeros nacionales e internacionales gracias a sus playas, su deliciosa gastronomía, las zonas arqueológicas mayas, los
items.summary_en: Yucatán is drawing local and international travelers with beaches, food, and Maya sites. The article points to quiet, lesser-known towns for people who already know Izamal.

items.summary_en: A health unit in the Xaxim neighborhood of Curitiba has started renovation work. Patients with scheduled appointments were already guided in recent days.

items.raw_excerpt: L’arrivée de la 1re et le départ de la deuxième étape de la Solitaire du Figaro Paprec se feront à Roscoff (Finistère). Pour l’occasion, du 10 au 14 septembre 2025, le port du Bloscon va se transformer en village foisonnant d’animations. Visite de bateaux, balades en mer, marché de producteurs, découverte des métiers de la Brittany Ferries… Voici le programme !
items.summary_en: The Solitaire du Figaro Paprec sailing race will stop in Roscoff, in Finistere. From September 10 to 14, 2025, the Bloscon port will become a busy festival village. Visitors can tour boats, take sea trips, visit a producers' market, and learn about Brittany Ferries jobs.
items.summary_ko: 솔리테르 뒤 피가로 파프렉 요트 대회가 피니스테르의 로스코프에 들른다. 2025년 9월 10일부터 14일까지 블로스콩 항구는 다양한 행사가 열리는 축제 마을로 바뀐다. 방문객들은 배를 둘러보고, 바다 산책에 나서고, 생산자 시장을 찾고, 브리타니 페리의 여러 일을 알아볼 수 있다.
items.title_en: Roscoff Port Plans a Sailing Festival
items.title_ko: 로스코프 항구, 요트 대회 맞아 축제장으로 변신
items.title_original: La Solitaire du Figaro Paprec fait escale à Roscoff, qui sera en fête du 10 au 14 septembre - Ouest-France
